mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_category WHERE CTGRY_DEPTH = #{ctgryDepth} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM t_category WHERE CTGRY_DEPTH = #{ctgryDepth} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM t_category WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CTGRY_DEPTH = #{ctgryDepth} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * ,(select title from t_feedback tf where tf.idx=a.fb_idx) fb_title FROM t_category a WHERE CTGRY_SEQ = #{ctgrySeq}
SELECT a.parent_seq , a.ctgry_depth FROM t_category a WHERE CTGRY_SEQ = #{ctgrySeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_category( CTGRY_DEPTH, CTGRY_NM, USE_YN, ORDER_NO, PARENT_SEQ, FB_IDX, PASS_IDX, OPEN_CLASS, PASS_CD )VALUES( #{ctgryDepth}, #{ctgryNm}, #{useYn}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ORDER_NO), 0)+1 FROM t_category AS T), #{parentSeq}, #{fbIdx}, #{passIdx}, #{openClass}, #{passCd} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_category SET CTGRY_NM = #{ctgryNm}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, FB_IDX=#{fbIdx}, PASS_IDX=#{passIdx}, PASS_CD=#{passCd}, OPEN_CLASS=#{openClass} WHERE CTGRY_SEQ = #{ctgrySeq}
mapper.select: /** 자식 카테고리 리스트 */ SELECT * FROM t_category WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND PARENT_SEQ = #{parentSeq} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
/** 자식 카테고리 리스트 */ SELECT * FROM t_category WHERE PARENT_SEQ = #{parentSeq} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
/** 자식 카테고리 리스트 */ SELECT * FROM t_category WHERE PARENT_SEQ = #{parentSeq} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT a.* FROM t_category a where a.ctgry_seq = (select parent_seq from t_category where ctgry_seq = #{ctgrySeq})
